title: Explosion Box
features: Exploding Design: Unfolds into multiple layers and compartments for a delightful surprise
Versatile Decoration: Includes decorative items to personalize with messages, images, or decoupage
Ideal Gift & Card Combo: Perfect for various occasions, from birthdays to Valentine's Day
Premium Quality: Crafted from sturdy cardboard for durability
Complete Set: Comes with a smaller box inside and a satin ribbon for a polished presentation
description: Description Gift box made of sturdy cardboard, which when opened "explodes" into several layers and compartments. The included decorations can be decorated with personal messages, pictures, etc. The box is a card and a gift.
